sourceTitle: Wikipedia: List of universities and colleges in Syria

rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/wikipedia-list-candidates.json
rawFiles.notes: Local automation candidate output retained in data-automation.

rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/seed-review-gaps.json
rawFiles.notes: Local held-candidate review artifact retained in data-automation.

rawFiles.name: outputs/universities/source-comparison-report.json
rawFiles.notes: Reviewed comparison artifact used to confirm these candidates were held out of the seed export.

transforms: Selected military and police candidates from the post-seed Wikipedia candidate batch.
Deferred sy-homs-military-academy because the local Wikipedia and Wikidata artifacts disagree on the founded year.
Set institutionType to other for military and police institutions.
Kept Arabic names absent because this batch uses only the approved Wikipedia list artifact and it did not provide source-backed Arabic names.
Kept websites null because no approved public source confirmed official websites for these records.
Imported only source-backed locality values and did not infer governorates.
reviewNotes: Third candidate-record batch import. The records remain sourced to the approved Wikipedia list source with CC BY-SA attribution retained through the source registry.
